title: SKN's Better Copper
description: The recent additions in snapshots for copper bars and stuff have made people hungry for more creative textures. I am here to support your needs!
body:
# Summary
Mojang's textures for the new copper bars and chains are objectively boring. I mean, there's nothing really connecting the textures to copper, other than the color...

And then along came me.

The signature addition of this is the copper bars, which are stylized based on copper grates. There's also shading changes to Copper Grates themselves. 

---
